name: psa_engine
reason: psa_engine is a separate repository - should not be nested in psaback

name: psa-rebuild
reason: psa-rebuild is a separate repository - should not be nested in psaback

name: psaback
reason: Nested psaback folder - likely duplicate or misorganized

name: model/doctrine_v2
reason: Doctrine content belongs in psa_engine, not psaback

name: required_element_sets
reason: Required element sets are doctrine content, belong in psa_engine

name: node_modules
reason: Node.js dependencies typically belong in psa-rebuild (UI) or should be removed if not needed

name: package.json
reason: package.json typically belongs in psa-rebuild (UI) unless psaback has its own Node.js components

name: static
reason: Static assets typically belong in psa-rebuild (UI) unless psaback serves them directly

name: templates
reason: Templates typically belong in psa-rebuild (UI) unless psaback serves HTML directly
